text: It is not clear why Joab preferred to send Chusi as a messenger; it may be he wished to spare Achimaas the fate of the Amalecite in 1.15 above. Of Chusi (wrongly confused by the older English versions with Chusai the Arachite) nothing is known, and some think it is only a description of his race, ‘the Cushite’ (or Ethiopian). But verse 14 above suggests that it may be the soldier there mentioned.
